name: Task Orchestration & DAG
description: Manages a directed acyclic graph (DAG) of task dependencies, ensuring tasks are started only when all their dependencies have resolved. Properly transitions queued tasks to running status when unblocked. Fires TaskReady events and detects dependency cycles.
